<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Md. Redoan — Portfolio</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Baloo+2:wght@500;600;700;800&family=Poppins:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --teal-deep:#0a3439;
    --teal-mid:#0e4d52;
    --teal-light:#13636a;
    --navbar:#0a2427;
    --lime:#c9f24d;
    --lime-dark:#a9d637;
    --ink:#0a2427;
    --text-soft:#5c7377;
    --paper:#f5f8f6;
    --card:#ffffff;
    --heading-font:'Baloo 2', 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    --body-font:'Poppins', sans-serif;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    font-family:var(--body-font);
    color:var(--ink);
    background:var(--paper);
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;}
  ul{list-style:none;}
  .wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 32px;}

  /* ===== Navbar ===== */
  nav{
    position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;
    background:var(--navbar);
    padding:14px 0;
    transition:box-shadow .3s ease, padding .3s ease;
  }
  nav.scrolled{
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    padding:10px 0;
  }
  nav .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;}
  .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
  .brand img{
    width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;
    border:2px solid var(--lime);
  }
  .brand span{
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
    font-weight:700;
    color:#fff;
    font-size:17px;
  }
  .nav-links{display:flex;gap:30px;}
  .nav-links a{
    color:#cfe4e2;
    font-size:14.5px;
    font-weight:500;
    transition:color .2s;
    position:relative;
    padding-bottom:4px;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--lime);}
  .nav-links a.active{color:var(--lime);}
  .nav-links a.active::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:-4px;
    height:2px;background:var(--lime);
    border-radius:2px;
  }
  .nav-cta{
    background:var(--lime);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:14px;
    padding:9px 20px;
    border-radius:999px;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .nav-toggle{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:26px;cursor:pointer;}

  @media (max-width:860px){
    .nav-links{
      position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;right:0;
      background:var(--navbar);
      flex-direction:column;
      padding:14px 32px 22px;
      gap:14px;
      display:none;
    }
    .nav-links.open{display:flex;}
    .nav-toggle{display:block;}
  }

  /* ===== Hero ===== */
  .hero{
    background:linear-gradient(120deg, var(--teal-deep) 0%, var(--teal-mid) 55%, var(--teal-light) 100%);
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    padding:70px 0 90px;
  }
  .hero .wrap{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.15fr 0.85fr;
    gap:40px;
    align-items:center;
    position:relative;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .hero-shape{
    position:absolute;
    border-radius:50%;
  }
  .hero-shape.s1{
    width:90px;height:90px;
    background:var(--lime);
    top:18%;left:2%;
    opacity:0.9;
    clip-path:polygon(0 0, 100% 50%, 0 100%);
  }
  .hero-shape.s2{
    width:120px;height:120px;
    border:2px solid rgba(201,242,77,0.4);
    bottom:8%;right:6%;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    display:inline-block;
    color:var(--lime);
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:13.5px;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:clamp(32px, 4.6vw, 52px);
    line-height:1.15;
    color:#fdfefb;
  }
  .hero h1 .accent{color:var(--lime);}
  .hero p.lead{
    margin-top:20px;
    color:#c9ddda;
    font-size:16.5px;
    max-width:52ch;
    line-height:1.7;
  }
  .role-badges{
    display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;
    margin-top:18px;
  }
  .role-badge{
    background:rgba(201,242,77,0.12);
    border:1px solid rgba(201,242,77,0.35);
    color:var(--lime);
    font-size:12.5px;
    font-weight:600;
    padding:6px 13px;
    border-radius:999px;
  }
  @media (max-width:860px){.role-badges{justify-content:center;}}
  .hero-actions{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-top:30px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .btn-fill{
    background:var(--lime);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-weight:600;
    padding:14px 28px;
    border-radius:10px;
    font-size:15px;
    transition:transform .2s, background .2s;
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .btn-fill:hover{background:var(--lime-dark);transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .btn-outline{
    border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    color:#fff;
    font-weight:600;
    padding:14px 28px;
    border-radius:10px;
    font-size:15px;
    transition:background .2s, transform .2s;
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);transform:translateY(-2px);}

  .hero-photo-wrap{
    position:relative;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .hero-photo{
    width:100%;
    max-width:340px;
    aspect-ratio:4/4.6;
    border-radius:22px;
    overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
    border:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    position:relative;
    animation:photoGlow 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes photoGlow{
    0%,100%{box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 rgba(201,242,77,0.0);}
    50%{box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 34px rgba(201,242,77,0.35);}
  }
  .hero-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .5s ease;}
  .hero-photo:hover img{transform:scale(1.08);}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .hero-photo{animation:none;}
  }
  .float-badge{
    position:absolute;
    background:#fff;
    color:var(--ink);
    padding:12px 18px;
    border-radius:14px;
    box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:600;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .float-badge.b1{top:6%;right:-6%;}
  .float-badge.b2{bottom:4%;left:-8%;}
  .dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--lime-dark);}
  @media (max-width:860px){
    .hero .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center;}
    .hero p.lead{margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}
    .hero-actions{justify-content:center;}
    .hero-photo-wrap{margin-top:20px;}
    .float-badge{display:none;}
  }

  /* ===== Section shell ===== */
  section{padding:80px 0;}
  .sec-tag{
    color:var(--teal-light);
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:13px;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .sec-title{
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
    font-size:clamp(24px,3.4vw,36px);
    font-weight:700;
    margin-top:8px;
    margin-bottom:16px;
  }
  .sec-sub{color:var(--text-soft);max-width:60ch;font-size:15.5px;line-height:1.7;}

  /* About */
  .service-cards{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(230px,1fr));
    gap:22px;
    margin-top:38px;
  }
  .service-card{
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:28px 24px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(10,52,57,0.07);
    text-align:left;
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
  }
  .service-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 20px 44px rgba(10,52,57,0.14);}
  .service-icon{font-size:30px;margin-bottom:14px;}
  .service-card h3{font-family:var(--heading-font);font-size:17px;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .service-card p{color:var(--text-soft);font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;}

  .about-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:50px;
    align-items:center;
    margin-top:36px;
  }
  .stat-cards{display:flex;gap:18px;margin-top:28px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .stat-card{
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:20px 24px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(10,52,57,0.08);
    text-align:center;
    min-width:130px;
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
  }
  .stat-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(10,52,57,0.14);}
  .stat-card b{font-family:var(--heading-font);font-size:30px;color:var(--teal-mid);display:block;}
  .stat-card span{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--text-soft);}
  @media (max-width:860px){.about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  /* Skills */
  .skills-section{background:var(--navbar);color:#fff;}
  .skills-section .sec-tag{color:var(--lime);}
  .skills-section .sec-sub{color:#b8ccc9;}
  .skill-cards{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:20px;
  }
  .skills-layout{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr;
    gap:44px;
    margin-top:38px;
    align-items:stretch;
  }
  .skills-photo{
    position:relative;
    border-radius:20px;
    overflow:hidden;
    min-height:340px;
  }
  .skills-photo img{
    width:100%;height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    display:block;
    filter:saturate(1.05) contrast(1.03);
  }
  .skills-photo-glow{
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(200deg, rgba(10,52,57,0) 40%, rgba(10,36,39,0.85) 100%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  @media (max-width:860px){
    .skills-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .skills-photo{min-height:220px;}
  }
  .skill-card{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:26px;
    transition:transform .25s ease, background .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
  }
  .skill-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.09);
    border-color:rgba(201,242,77,0.35);
  }
  .skill-card .num{
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
    color:var(--lime);
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:10px;
    display:block;
  }
  .skill-card h3{font-family:var(--heading-font);font-size:18px;margin-bottom:10px;}
  .skill-card ul li{
    font-size:14px;color:#c9ddda;padding:4px 0;
    position:relative;padding-left:16px;
  }
  .skill-card ul li::before{content:'▸';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--lime);}

  /* Experience / Education timeline */
  .timeline{margin-top:36px;}
  .t-item{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:130px 1fr;
    gap:24px;
    padding:22px 0;
    border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8e6;
  }
  .t-item:first-child{padding-top:0;}
  .t-item .when{
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--teal-mid);
    font-size:14px;
  }
  .t-item h3{font-size:18px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;}
  .t-item p{color:var(--text-soft);font-size:14.5px;}
  .tag-chip{
    display:inline-block;
    background:#eaf7ed;
    color:var(--teal-mid);
    font-size:11.5px;
    font-weight:600;
    padding:3px 10px;
    border-radius:999px;
    margin-top:8px;
  }

  /* Projects */
  .project-cards{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));
    gap:24px;
    margin-top:38px;
  }
  .project-card{
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:18px;
    padding:28px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(10,52,57,0.07);
    border-top:4px solid var(--lime);
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
  }
  .project-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow:0 20px 44px rgba(10,52,57,0.15);
  }
  .project-card h3{font-family:var(--heading-font);font-size:19px;margin-bottom:10px;}
  .project-card p{color:var(--text-soft);font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.6;}
  .project-shot{
    margin-top:16px;
    border-radius:10px;
    overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid #e2e8e6;
  }
  .project-shot img{width:100%;display:block;}
  .tech-tags{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px;}
  .tech-tag{
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
    font-size:11px;font-weight:600;
    background:#eef3f1;color:var(--teal-mid);
    padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;
  }
  .project-links{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .project-links a{
    font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;
    padding:9px 16px;border-radius:8px;
  }
  .project-links a:not(.soon){background:var(--teal-mid);color:#fff;border:1px solid var(--teal-mid);}
  .project-links a:not(.soon):hover{background:var(--teal-deep);}
  .project-links a.soon{
    border-style:dashed;
    color:var(--text-soft);
    border-color:#c7d3d1;
    cursor:default;
    background:transparent;
  }

  /* Contact */
  .contact-section{
    background:linear-gradient(120deg, var(--teal-deep), var(--teal-mid));
    color:#fff;
    border-radius:28px;
    margin:0 32px;
    padding:60px 40px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;
  }
  .contact-section .sec-tag{color:var(--lime);}
  .vcard-frame{
    max-width:520px;
    margin:38px auto 0;
    border-radius:16px;
    overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(10,52,57,0.18);
    transition:transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
  }
  .vcard-frame:hover{
    transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.01);
    box-shadow:0 28px 60px rgba(10,52,57,0.24);
  }
  .vcard-frame img{width:100%;display:block;}
  .vcard-frame{cursor:zoom-in;}

  .lightbox{
    display:none;
    position:fixed;inset:0;
    background:rgba(5,15,17,0.92);
    z-index:200;
    align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    padding:40px;
  }
  .lightbox.open{display:flex;}
  .lightbox img{
    max-width:min(900px,90vw);
    max-height:85vh;
    border-radius:12px;
    box-shadow:0 30px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }
  .lightbox-close{
    position:absolute;top:24px;right:28px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    color:#fff;font-size:20px;
    width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;
    cursor:pointer;
  }
  .lightbox-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);}

  .cert-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,340px));
    gap:24px;
    margin-top:36px;
    justify-content:start;
  }
  .cert-card{
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:16px;
    overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(10,52,57,0.07);
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
  }
  .cert-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(10,52,57,0.13);}
  .cert-card img{width:100%;display:block;}
  .cert-card.cert-pending{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .cert-placeholder{
    background:#eef3f1;
    color:var(--teal-light);
    font-size:44px;
    height:180px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  }
  .cert-info{padding:18px 20px;}
  .cert-info h3{font-family:var(--heading-font);font-size:16.5px;margin-bottom:6px;}
  .cert-info p{color:var(--text-soft);font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;}

  .love-section{background:#f2f6f4;}
  .love-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));
    gap:18px;
    margin-top:34px;
  }
  .love-card{
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:18px 20px;
    display:flex;
    gap:14px;
    align-items:flex-start;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(10,52,57,0.06);
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
  }
  .love-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(10,52,57,0.1);}
  .love-avatar{
    width:40px;height:40px;flex-shrink:0;
    border-radius:50%;
    color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-family:var(--heading-font);
  }
  .love-name{font-weight:600;font-size:14px;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;}
  .love-body p{color:var(--text-soft);font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;margin:0;}
  .contact-cards{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));
    gap:20px;
    margin-top:32px;
  }
  .c-card{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:22px;
    transition:transform .25s ease, background .25s ease;
  }
  .c-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.13);
  }
  .c-card .k{font-size:12px;color:var(--lime);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;}
  .c-card .v{display:block;margin-top:6px;font-size:15.5px;font-weight:500;}
  .c-card a.pill{
    display:inline-block;margin-top:12px;
    background:var(--lime);color:var(--ink);
    font-weight:600;font-size:12.5px;
    padding:7px 14px;border-radius:999px;
  }

  footer{
    text-align:center;
    padding:36px 20px;
    color:var(--text-soft);
    font-size:13px;
  }
  .footer-inner{
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  }
  .footer-links{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
  .footer-links a{
    font-weight:600;color:var(--teal-mid);
    transition:color .2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover{color:var(--lime-dark);}
  .visitor-count{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--text-soft);opacity:0.85;}
  .comments-wrap{max-width:820px;}
  #disqus_thread{margin-top:30px;}

  /* Floating WhatsApp */
  .whatsapp-float{
    position:fixed;
    bottom:24px;right:24px;
    width:58px;height:58px;
    background:#25D366;
    border-radius:50%;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    z-index:100;
    transition:transform .2s;
  }
  .whatsapp-float:hover{transform:scale(1.08);}
  .whatsapp-float svg{width:28px;height:28px;}

  /* Scroll reveal */
  .reveal{
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(24px);
    transition:opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease;
  }
  .reveal-in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .reveal{opacity:1;transform:none;transition:none;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="wrap">
    <a href="#home" class="brand">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Md. Redoan">
      <span>Md. Redoan</span>
    </a>
    <ul class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
      <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
      <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="#certificates">Certificates</a></li>
      <li><a href="#card">Business Card</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
      <li><a href="#comments">Comments</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;">
      <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Hire Me</a>
      <button class="nav-toggle" id="navToggle" aria-label="Menu">☰</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-shape s1"></div>
  <div class="hero-shape s2"></div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div>
      <span class="eyebrow">Administrative &amp; Accounts Assistant</span>
      <h1>Turning Everyday Work into <span class="accent">Digital Solutions</span></h1>
      <div class="role-badges">
        <span class="role-badge">✅ Web Developer</span>
        <span class="role-badge">✅ Administrative Assistant</span>
        <span class="role-badge">✅ ERP Operator</span>
      </div>
      <p class="lead">I'm Md. Redoan — handling manpower and accounts at MIM International, and building simple digital tools like forms, trackers, and websites that make office and community work easier.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#projects" class="btn-fill">View My Work</a>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Contact Me</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
      <div class="hero-photo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Md. Redoan">
      </div>
      <div class="float-badge b1"><span class="dot"></span> Available for work</div>
      <div class="float-badge b2"><span class="dot"></span> Bhandaria,Pirojpur,Barishal,Bangladesh</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="services">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">What I Can Build</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Services</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">A few of the digital systems I can put together for offices, associations, and small businesses.</p>
    <div class="service-cards">
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">📝</div>
        <h3>Online Form Development</h3>
        <p>Registration, application, or intake forms that replace paper sign-up sheets and organise responses automatically.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">💼</div>
        <h3>Attendance Management System</h3>
        <p>Simple daily check-in trackers for office staff, cutting down on manual attendance registers.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">🏢</div>
        <h3>Samity Management Website</h3>
        <p>Websites for local associations (samity) to publish notices, member info, and activities online.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">🌐</div>
        <h3>Portfolio Website</h3>
        <p>Clean, professional personal or business portfolio sites — like this one.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="about">
  <div class="wrap about-grid">
    <div>
      <span class="sec-tag">About Me</span>
      <h2 class="sec-title">A little about my journey</h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">I completed my HSC in Humanities and SSC in Science from Mafsar Ul-Ulum Alim Madrasah. Since September 2024, I've worked as a Manpower &amp; Accounted Assistant Officer at MIM International, working daily with ERP software, MS Office, and office record-keeping. Alongside my job, I enjoy building small digital tools — registration forms, attendance trackers, and websites — to solve everyday problems at work and in my community.</p>
      <div class="stat-cards">
        <div class="stat-card">
          <b class="counter" data-target="1" data-suffix="+">0</b>
          <span>Years Experience</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <b class="counter" data-target="3" data-suffix="+">0</b>
          <span>Projects Built</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <b class="counter" data-target="100" data-suffix="%">0</b>
          <span>Responsive Design</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <span class="sec-tag">Interests</span>
      <h2 class="sec-title">What I enjoy</h2>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;">
        <span class="tag-chip">Reading</span>
        <span class="tag-chip">Music</span>
        <span class="tag-chip">Internet Browsing</span>
        <span class="tag-chip">Traveling</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="skills-section" id="skills">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">What I Work With</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Skills &amp; Tools</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">A mix of office software, digital literacy, and a working style built for getting things done.</p>
    <div class="skills-layout">
      <div class="skills-photo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Md. Redoan working at his desk">
        <div class="skills-photo-glow"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-cards">
        <div class="skill-card">
          <span class="num">01</span>
          <h3>Office &amp; Systems</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>MS Word, Excel</li>
            <li>ERP software (daily use)</li>
            <li>Adobe Photoshop</li>
            <li>Windows XP through 11</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-card">
          <span class="num">02</span>
          <h3>Digital Literacy</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Internet research &amp; browsing</li>
            <li>Basic hardware &amp; software maintenance</li>
            <li>Professional email correspondence</li>
            <li>Bangla 20 WPM · English 30 WPM typing</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-card">
          <span class="num">03</span>
          <h3>Working Style</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Calm under pressure</li>
            <li>Self-motivated, adaptable</li>
            <li>Works well solo or in a group</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="experience">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">My Path</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Experience &amp; Education</h2>
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="t-item">
        <div class="when">2024 — Present</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Manpower &amp; Accounted Assistant Officer</h3>
          <p>MIM International — handling manpower coordination and accounts support, working daily with ERP software, MS Office, and office record-keeping.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="t-item">
        <div class="when">2025</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC)</h3>
          <p>Mafsar Ul-Ulum Alim Madrasah · Madrasah Board · Group: Humanities</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="t-item">
        <div class="when">2023</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Secondary School Certificate (SSC)</h3>
          <p>Mafsar Ul-Ulum Alim Madrasah · Madrasah Board · Group: Science</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="projects">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">Side Projects</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Digital Systems Built</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Small tools I've built to make office and community work simpler.</p>
    <div class="project-cards">
      <div class="project-card">
        <h3>Event Registration Form</h3>
        <p>A structured online form for collecting attendee registrations for a community event, replacing paper sign-up sheets.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">HTML</span><span class="tech-tag">CSS</span><span class="tech-tag">JavaScript</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-shot">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Event registration form for a school reunion — countdown, schedule, and sign-up fields">
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="#" class="soon">🔗 Live Demo — coming soon</a>
          <a href="#" class="soon">💻 GitHub — coming soon</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-card">
        <h3>Office Attendance System</h3>
        <p>A simple daily attendance tracker to log staff check-ins for office use, cutting down on manual register-keeping.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">HTML</span><span class="tech-tag">CSS</span><span class="tech-tag">JavaScript</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-shot">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Office Attendance System — login, admin dashboard, and employee check-in screens">
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="#" class="soon">🔗 Live Demo — coming soon</a>
          <a href="#" class="soon">💻 GitHub — coming soon</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-card">
        <h3>Samity (Association) Website</h3>
        <p>A website for a local samity to publish notices, member information, and activities to a wider audience online.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">HTML</span><span class="tech-tag">CSS</span><span class="tech-tag">JavaScript</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-shot">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Bondhutto Sanchay Samity website — registration, login, admin panel, and member dashboard">
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="#" class="soon">🔗 Live Demo — coming soon</a>
          <a href="#" class="soon">💻 GitHub — coming soon</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="certificates">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">Verified Credentials</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Certificates</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Formal training that backs up my day-to-day skills.</p>
    <div class="cert-grid">
      <div class="cert-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="National Skill Standard — Computer Office Application certificate">
        <div class="cert-info">
          <h3>Computer Office Application</h3>
          <p>National Skill Standard Basic Course · Bangladesh Technical Education Board · Grade A+ · 2024</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="love" class="love-section">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">From Friends &amp; Family</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Community Love 💬</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">These are personal side projects, built for fun and practice — here's what people said when I shared them.</p>
    <div class="love-grid">
      <div class="love-card">
        <div class="love-avatar" style="background:#3b6fa8;">MS</div>
        <div class="love-body">
          <span class="love-name">Md Sakib Gazi</span>
          <p>Good job</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="love-card">
        <div class="love-avatar" style="background:#4d8a6f;">আ</div>
        <div class="love-body">
          <span class="love-name">আতিকুর রহমান</span>
          <p>সুন্দর হইছে।</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="love-card">
        <div class="love-avatar" style="background:#a8556b;">SI</div>
        <div class="love-body">
          <span class="love-name">Sultana Islam</span>
          <p>অনেক সুন্দর হইছে 💝 দোয়া করি অনেক সফল হও</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="love-card">
        <div class="love-avatar" style="background:#c78a3b;">KA</div>
        <div class="love-body">
          <span class="love-name">Keya Akter</span>
          <p>মাশাআল্লাহ খুব সুন্দর হয়েছে দোয়া রইলো</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="card">
  <div class="wrap" style="text-align:center;">
    <span class="sec-tag">Official Contact Card</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">My Business Card</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub" style="margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;">Reach me directly at MIM International using the details below. <em>(Click the card to view full screen.)</em></p>
    <div class="vcard-frame" id="vcardTrigger" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="View business card full screen">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Md. Redoan visiting card — MIM International">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="lightbox" id="vcardLightbox">
  <button class="lightbox-close" id="vcardClose" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Md. Redoan visiting card — full screen">
</div>

<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-section">
    <span class="sec-tag">Get in Touch</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title" style="color:#fff;">Let's work together</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub" style="color:#cfe4e2;">Reach out by email, phone, or Facebook — or download my CV below.</p>
    <div class="contact-cards">
      <div class="c-card">
        <span class="k">Email</span>
        <span class="v">mdradoangazi@gmail.com</span>
        <a class="pill" href="mailto:mdradoangazi@gmail.com">Send Email</a>
      </div>

        <span class="k">Phone</span>
        <span class="v">01748723661</span>
        <a class="pill" href="tel:+8801748723661">Call</a>
      </div>
      <div class="c-card">
        <span class="k">Alt. Phone</span>
        <span class="v">01604861037</span>
        <a class="pill" href="tel:+8801604861037">Call</a>
      </div>

        <span class="v">Mohammad Redoan</span>
        <a class="pill" href="https://www.facebook.com/share/1E27oJypJt/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Visit Profile</a>

        <span class="k">LinkedIn</span>
        <span class="v">mdredoangazi</span>

      </div>

        <span class="k">WhatsApp</span>
        <span class="v">01748723661</span>
        <a class="pill" href="https://wa.me/8801748723661" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Message</a>
      </div>
      <div class="c-card">
        <span class="k">Telegram</span>
        <span class="v" style="font-size:14px;color:#cfe4e2;">redoan64</span>
      </div>
      <div class="c-card">
        <span class="k">Resume</span>
        <span class="v">Full CV</span>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px;">
          <a class="pill" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="data:image/jpeg;base64,">View</a>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="comments">
  <div class="wrap comments-wrap">
    <span class="sec-tag">Say Hello</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Leave a Comment</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Liked something on the site? Have feedback? Drop a comment below.</p>
    <div id="disqus_thread"></div>
    <script>
      var disqus_config = function () {
        this.page.url = "https://mohammadredoangazi-max.github.io/redoan-web/";
        this.page.identifier = "redoan-portfolio-home";
      };
      (function() {
        var d = document, s = d.createElement('script');
        s.src = 'https://redoan-portfolio.disqus.com/embed.js';
        s.setAttribute('data-timestamp', +new Date());
        (d.head || d.body).appendChild(s);
      })();
    </script>
    <noscript>Please enable JavaScript to view the <a href="https://disqus.com/?ref_noscript">comments powered by Disqus.</a></noscript>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/share/1E27oJypJt/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Facebook</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mdredoangazi" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="#home">Back to Top ↑</a>
    </div>
    <div>© 2026 Mohammad Redoan</div>
    <div style="font-size:11.5px;opacity:0.8;">Designed &amp; Developed by Mohammad Redoan</div>
    <div class="visitor-count">👀 <span id="visitorCount">…</span> visitors so far</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<a class="whatsapp-float" href="https://wa.me/8801748723661" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="WhatsApp">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="#fff" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M16.001 2.667c-7.364 0-13.334 5.97-13.334 13.334 0 2.354.615 4.66 1.784 6.687L2.667 29.333l6.79-1.78a13.27 13.27 0 0 0 6.544 1.72h.005c7.363 0 13.333-5.97 13.333-13.334S23.365 2.667 16.001 2.667zm7.82 18.874c-.335.941-1.653 1.72-2.706 1.945-.72.153-1.66.276-4.82-1.036-3.766-1.56-6.19-5.34-6.38-5.588-.183-.248-1.53-2.036-1.53-3.884s.977-2.75 1.34-3.127c.335-.351.732-.44.976-.44.244 0 .488.002.7.013.224.011.526-.085.822.628.335.807 1.14 2.787 1.24 2.99.1.203.166.44.033.71-.132.27-.198.44-.396.678-.198.238-.417.531-.596.714-.198.203-.404.423-.174.828.23.406 1.02 1.68 2.19 2.722 1.505 1.34 2.77 1.755 3.174 1.953.404.198.64.166.876-.102.237-.267 1.007-1.174 1.276-1.577.27-.404.541-.336.913-.203.372.132 2.365 1.115 2.77 1.318.404.203.673.304.772.474.1.17.1.982-.235 1.923z"/></svg>
</a>

<script>
  document.getElementById('navToggle').addEventListener('click', function(){
    document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.toggle('open');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(function(a){
    a.addEventListener('click', function(){
      document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.remove('open');
    });
  });

  // Premium scroll-reveal
  var revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.skill-card, .project-card, .t-item, .c-card, .vcard-frame, .about-grid > div, .stat, .cert-card, .love-card, .service-card');
  revealEls.forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('reveal'); });
  var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
    entries.forEach(function(entry){
      if(entry.isIntersecting){
        entry.target.classList.add('reveal-in');
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });
  revealEls.forEach(function(el){ observer.observe(el); });

  // Visitor counter (counts once per browser per day using sessionStorage as a soft guard)
  (function(){
    var el = document.getElementById('visitorCount');
    if(!el) return;
    var ns = 'mohammadredoangazi-max-redoan-web';
    var key = 'redoan-portfolio-visited-today';
    var alreadyCounted = sessionStorage.getItem(key);
    var endpoint = 'https://api.counterapi.dev/v1/' + ns + '/' + (alreadyCounted ? 'visits' : 'visits/up');
    fetch(endpoint)
      .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
      .then(function(data){
        el.textContent = (data && (data.count ?? data.value)) ?? '—';
        sessionStorage.setItem(key, '1');
      })
      .catch(function(){ el.textContent = '—'; });
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html>
